docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-12-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UDR APARTMENTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACOBS, ALICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UDR APARTMENTS $793.08 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $838.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACOBS, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT UDR APARTMENTS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ALICE JACOBS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UDR APARTMENTS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS SWORN AND PLACED UNDER OATH. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $793.08 FILED BY JACOBS, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT UDR APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
